faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Roslyn homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies in Roslyn properties are typically caused by organic buildup in drains, pipes, and sewage systems. They breed in the gelatinous film that accumulates in bathroom drains, kitchen sinks, and basement floor drains. Older homes in Roslyn with aging plumbing are particularly susceptible to these infestations.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Roslyn?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Roslyn homes take 1-2 hours depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. Our technicians thoroughly treat all affected drains, apply bio-enzymatic cleaners to break down organic matter, and inspect potential breeding sites. Follow-up treatments may be recommended for severe cases.

faqs.question: Is drain fly treatment safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved, eco-friendly products that are safe for families and pets in Roslyn homes. Our bio-enzymatic treatments naturally break down organic matter without harsh chemicals. You can typically resume normal activities immediately after treatment, though we recommend following any specific instructions provided by your technician.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 - $550 drain fly treatment price?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and potential breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic drain treatments, mechanical cleaning where needed, application of residual treatments, and detailed prevention recommendations.
